text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "lsass.exe is modifying registry keys related to TCP/IP parameters and Windows Time service secure time limits (W32Time). While lsass.exe relies on these services, directly creating and setting parameters in these locations is not typical behavior for its core functions and could indicate an attempt to manipulate system settings.",
  "indicators": [
    "lsass.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set",
    "HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\Tcpip\\Parameters",
    "HKLM\\System\\CurrentControlSet\\Services\\W32Time\\SecureTimeLimits"
  ]
}
